name: Asia Financial Holdings Limited
summary: Asia Financial Holdings Limited underwrites general and life insurance in Hong Kong, Macau, and Mainland China. It operates through in segments, Insurance and Corporate. The company is also involved in securities trading and holding business; and provision of mortgage loan financing, nominee, and health care services. In addition, it engages in the property investment activities. The company is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Asia Financial Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Claremont Capital Holdings Ltd.
